name: About Page Layout
description: LudoEmpire about us page with brand story and stats

config.content.title: The Story Behind LudoEmpire
config.content.description: We're on a mission to bring the classic board game experience to millions of players worldwide.
config.content.story:
LudoEmpire was born from a simple idea: what if the beloved board game Ludo could be played online with the same excitement, fairness, and fun? Founded in 2024, we've grown from a small team of gaming enthusiasts to a platform serving millions of players across the globe.

Our commitment to fair play, transparent gameplay, and community-driven development has made us one of the most trusted online Ludo platforms in the world.

4.8|App Rating|On Google Play Store
config.values.items:
🎯 Fair Play|Every game is powered by certified RNG. We believe in equal opportunities for all players.
🔒 Security First|Your data and money are protected with bank-grade encryption and security measures.
🤝 Community|We're building more than a game - we're building a community of passionate Ludo players.
🚀 Innovation|Constantly improving with new features, game modes, and experiences.
